payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Close-up of a white-painted double-hung window partially cropped at the right and bottom edges, fitted with white horizontal venetian blinds (plastic/metal) whose slats are slightly tilted and show an exterior building through gaps; pull cord visible at right — photographed from approximately 0.5 m away.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white window with venetian blinds","long_description":"Close-up of a white-painted double-hung window partially cropped at the right and bottom edges, fitted with white horizontal venetian blinds (plastic/metal) whose slats are slightly tilted and show an exterior building through gaps; pull cord visible at right — photographed from approximately 0.5 m away.","attributes":["white painted frame","horizontal venetian blinds","slats slightly tilted","visible pull cord","partial/edge-cropped","exterior visible through slats","interior close-up","intact condition"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
